summary: Iteration 79 - Official Curriculum APIs and School Settings Page Testing. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). All 13 frontend tests passed (100%). The official curriculum data from Saudi Ministry of Education is correctly displayed in the School Settings page with proper read-only indicators.

issues: Multiple 404 errors for school-specific endpoints (teachers, classes, assignments, constraints) - expected for empty data

tests: TEST 2: Navigation to settings page - PASSED
TEST 3: Settings page header found - PASSED
TEST 7: Stages stat label found - PASSED
TEST 8: Tracks stat label found - PASSED
TEST 9: Clicked Subject Distribution tab - PASSED
TEST 10: Found 3 stages in accordion - PASSED
TEST 11: Clicked Rank Loads tab - PASSED
TEST 13: Found 3 weekly period values - PASSED

api_official_curriculum_stats.details: Returns correct counts: 3 stages, 8 tracks, 29 grades, 81 subjects, 394 mappings, 7 teacher ranks

api_official_curriculum_stages.details: Returns 3 stages (ابتدائية, متوسطة, ثانوية) with all required fields

api_official_curriculum_tracks.details: Returns 8 tracks with filtering by stage_id working correctly

api_official_curriculum_grades.details: Returns 29 grades with stage/track name enrichment

api_official_curriculum_teacher_rank_loa.details: Returns 7 teacher ranks with correct weekly periods (24, 24, 22, 18, 18, 16, 14)

api_official_curriculum_grade_subjects.details: Returns subject distribution for specific grade with summary stats

api_official_curriculum_stage_full.details: Returns complete curriculum hierarchy for a stage

ui_settings_page_structure.details: Two main sections: Dynamic Timetable Inputs and Official Static Reference Data

ui_static_section_curriculum_stats.details: Displays all curriculum stats (3 مرحلة, 8 مسار, 29 صف, 81 مادة, 394 توزيع, 7 رتبة معلم)

ui_subject_distribution_accordion.details: Shows 3 stages as expandable accordion items with grade counts

ui_teacher_rank_loads_display.details: Shows all 7 teacher ranks with weekly periods in card format

ui_locked_data_indicator.details: Shows 'بيانات مقفلة' badge and 'هذه البيانات رسمية ومقفلة' message

critical_code_review_comments: All official curriculum APIs are working correctly with proper data
Frontend correctly displays read-only data with locked indicators
Accordion component for subject distribution is interactive and functional
Teacher rank loads display shows all 7 ranks with correct weekly periods
seed_data_creation: None - used existing official curriculum data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Official Curriculum APIs are fully functional. The School Settings page (/principal/settings) has two main sections: 1) البيانات المتغيرة لبناء الجدول (Dynamic Timetable Inputs) with 8 tabs for editable data, and 2) البيانات الأساسية الثابتة (Official Static Reference Data) with 4 tabs showing read-only curriculum data from Saudi Ministry of Education. The static section includes: المنهج الرسمي (curriculum stats), المراحل والمسارات (stages and tracks), النصاب التعليمي (teacher rank loads with 7 ranks), and توزيع المواد (subject distribution with expandable accordion for 3 stages). All data is marked as 'بيانات مقفلة' (locked data) indicating it cannot be modified.
